message:
test(pthread): MR broadcast drains Waiting, signal population-aware (bd-nqoa)

Two condvar contract proptests that fence the wake-one-vs-wake-all
semantic split:

prop_broadcast_drains_waiting_regardless_of_has_waiters
  Waiting + Broadcast always → Idle, regardless of has_waiters.

prop_signal_waiting_depends_on_has_waiters
  Waiting + Signal(true) stays Waiting (other waiters still parked);
  Waiting + Signal(false) → Idle (last waiter woken).

Exercises the has_waiters parameter that disambiguates the Waiting→Idle
arrow — a dimension the existing unit tests sample only at single points.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
